title: Missing Number
pattern: Bit Manipulation / Math â€” XOR or Sum Formula
coreIdea: Find the single missing number from a sequence of 0 to n by either XOR-ing all array elements with all numbers 0 to n (pairs cancel, leaving the missing number), or by computing expected sum minus actual sum.
recognitionCues: array contains n distinct numbers from range [0,n] with exactly one missing
approach: XOR approach: XOR together all numbers from 0 to n AND all elements in the array; matching pairs cancel to 0, leaving only the missing number. Alternative: compute expected sum = n*(n+1)/2, subtract actual array sum, the difference is the missing number.
